title: Stalin Sivadas
subTitle: A righteous member of a political party faces unforeseen circumstances when he gains the respect of the masses and incurs the wrath of powerful rivals.

title: Rathimanmadhan
subTitle: While looking for a suitable groom for her unmarried daughter, a man falls ill. However, his daughter's life changes with the arrival of a young man.

title: Auto Brothers
subTitle: Friends and autorickshaw drivers Babu, Krishnan, Raju, Sudhakaran and Ravi face a dangerous turn of events that forces them to confront the brutality of terrorists.

title: Filler

title: Ezham Suryan
subTitle: Chithrabhanu rapes a young girl named Gopika under the pretence of safeguarding her. Later, she sets out to seek revenge against him.

title: Odaruthammava Aalariyam
subTitle: Nair, an old man, befriends three bachelors assuming that he can join their gang and flirt with young girls. However, Nair is enraged when these bachelors try to woo his own daughter, Minu.

title: Sachin
subTitle: A boy is named after Sachin Tendulkar, as his birth coincides with a celebratory day. As he grows older and falls for a woman named Anjali, he finds that they have a lot more in common than usual.

title: Udumbu
subTitle: Udumbu

title: Mayavi
subTitle: Mahi, a seasoned convict who is well-known for attacking his enemies stealthily, decides to murder someone in order to raise money for his friend.

title: Yuvathurki
subTitle: A wrongly incarcerated man cannot stand the injustice meted out to the prisoners in jail and questions the authorities. When he is severely tortured, he begins to lose his faith in the system.

title: Yuvathurki
subTitle: A wrongly incarcerated man cannot stand the injustice meted out to the prisoners in jail and questions the authorities. When he is severely tortured, he begins to lose his faith in the system.

title: Chiratta Kalippattangal
subTitle: Mathayi, a sculptor, leads a disturbed married life as his wife forces him to quit drugs. However, she divorces him by the time he realises his mistakes.

title: OK Chacko Cochin Mumbai
subTitle: When an old associate of Cochin's three thieves, Chacko Bhai, makes a visit from Mumbai, the lives of the trio take an odd turn.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: King Fish
subTitle: Things go awry after a young real estate agent receives a mysterious call from an estranged uncle about the inheritance of a fortune.

title: Adimura
subTitle: Sakthi, a small-time thief, learns ancient Tamil martial art Adimurai. Meanwhile, a villain and his son challenge him to a kickboxing match.

title: Nadan Pennum Natupramaniyum
subTitle: The life of Govindan, a ruthless businessman, is turned upside down when a woman enters his life to avenge her father's losses.

title: Jo And the Boy
subTitle: Jo resigns from her job to pursue her childhood dream of becoming a successful animator. Her dream comes true when she meets an innovative boy who inspires her to create a cartoon character.

title: Baashha
subTitle: Bound by a promise to his late father, a gangster becomes an autorickshaw driver. However, when his past catches up with him, he must choose between succumbing to his old ways and keeping his word.

title: Karma
subTitle: The life of Achuthan, a village boy, turns upside down when he finds out that Sreedharan, a business tycoon, is his father.

title: Thanthra

title: Grihanathan
subTitle: A rich businessman named Vishwanathan experiences an unexpected shift in his life when his wife assumes command of their finances and starts managing their household affairs.

title: Sir
subTitle: When a private teacher is posted to a government school, he decides to fight for education after noticing its neglected state and faces the odds.

title: Adhipan
subTitle: Prakash is a famous criminal lawyer in the city. He decides to take revenge against Mohan, who had gotten away after murdering his sister.

title: Chandrettan Evideya
subTitle: Sushama is upset when an astrologer tells her that her husband was in love with a dancer in his previous birth. Her worries turn real when he gets close to Geetanjali, a dancer.

title: M. Kumaran Son Of Mahalakshmi
subTitle: Besides his girlfriend, Kumaran is very passionate about kick-boxing. His life is shattered when his dying mother asks him to meet his estranged father in Malaysia.

title: Ulladakkam
subTitle: Doctor Sunny, a psychiatrist, is engaged to Annie. However, when he helps a patient, Reshma, recover from trauma, she develops an obsession with him.
